title: Cannot call non-const function in const context
explanation: This error occurs when you try to call a function that is not marked as `const` in a context that requires constant evaluation, such as array sizes, const variables, or static initializers.
error_message: error[E0015]: calls in constants are limited to constant functions, tuple structs and tuple variants

fixes.description: Use a Vec for runtime-determined sizes

tip: The `const fn` feature has been expanded significantly. Many standard library functions are now const. Check the docs to see if the function you need has a const version.
